9
10#ifndef LLVM_DEBUGINFO_DWARFFORMVALUE_H
11#define LLVM_DEBUGINFO_DWARFFORMVALUE_H
12
13#include "llvm/ADT/ArrayRef.h"
14#include "llvm/ADT/Optional.h"
15#include "llvm/Support/DataExtractor.h"
16
17namespace llvm {
18
19class DWARFUnit;
20class raw_ostream;
21
22class DWARFFormValue {
23public:
24 enum FormClass {
25 FC_Unknown,
26 FC_Address,
27 FC_Block,
28 FC_Constant,
29 FC_String,
30 FC_Flag,
31 FC_Reference,
32 FC_Indirect,
33 FC_SectionOffset,
34 FC_Exprloc
35 };
36
37private:
38 struct ValueType {
39 ValueType() : data(nullptr) {
40 uval = 0;
41 }
42
43 union {
44 uint64_t uval;
45 int64_t sval;
46 const char* cstr;
47 };
48 const uint8_t* data;
49 };
50
51 uint16_t Form; // Form for this value.
52 ValueType Value; // Contains all data for the form.
53
54public:
55 DWARFFormValue(uint16_t Form = 0) : Form(Form) {}
56 uint16_t getForm() const { return Form; }
57 bool isFormClass(FormClass FC) const;
58
59 void dump(raw_ostream &OS, const DWARFUnit *U) const;
60
61 /// \brief extracts a value in data at offset *offset_ptr.
62 ///
63 /// The passed DWARFUnit is allowed to be nullptr, in which
64 /// case no relocation processing will be performed and some
65 /// kind of forms that depend on Unit information are disallowed.
66 /// \returns wether the extraction succeeded.
67 bool extractValue(DataExtractor data, uint32_t *offset_ptr,
68 const DWARFUnit *u);
69 bool isInlinedCStr() const {
70 return Value.data != nullptr && Value.data == (const uint8_t*)Value.cstr;
71 }
72
73 /// getAsFoo functions below return the extracted value as Foo if only
74 /// DWARFFormValue has form class is suitable for representing Foo.
75 Optional<uint64_t> getAsReference(const DWARFUnit *U) const;
76 Optional<uint64_t> getAsUnsignedConstant() const;
77 Optional<const char *> getAsCString(const DWARFUnit *U) const;
78 Optional<uint64_t> getAsAddress(const DWARFUnit *U) const;
79 Optional<uint64_t> getAsSectionOffset() const;
80 Optional<ArrayRef<uint8_t>> getAsBlock() const;
81
82 bool skipValue(DataExtractor debug_info_data, uint32_t *offset_ptr,
83 const DWARFUnit *u) const;
84 static bool skipValue(uint16_t form, DataExtractor debug_info_data,
85 uint32_t *offset_ptr, const DWARFUnit *u);
86
87 static ArrayRef<uint8_t> getFixedFormSizes(uint8_t AddrSize,
88 uint16_t Version);
89};
90
91}
92
93#endif

DataExtractor.h
Optional.h
ValueType
PointerUnion< const Value *, const PseudoSourceValue * > ValueType
